headline: Here's Why Phillips 66's Refining Strength Supports Long-Term Growth
summary: PSX's access to low-cost crude and an efficient refining network positions it to benefit from rising fuel demand and stronger refining margins.

headline: Citigroup Maintains Neutral on Valero Energy, Raises Price Target to $302
summary: Citigroup  analyst Vikram Bagri   maintains Valero Energy (NYSE:VLO) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $259 to $302.

headline: Oil Is at $72. Diesel Is Pricing In $140. That's the Inflation Warning Wall Street May Be Missing.
